headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -115.7)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 165% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 158 quotes and an overwhelming 130 at strong intensity - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• At 107.1, this is well within the typical frustration range but represents a sharp spike from yesterday's 63.6.

• Optimism crashed from positive territory yesterday to -17.6 today, while fears remain relatively quiet despite having 30 strong-intensity quotes.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
